meanings.definition: the quality of a substance that is able to rebound
a light, self-propelled movement upwards or forwards
rebounding from an impact (or series of impacts)
spring back; spring away from an impact
examples: These particles do not resile but they unite after they collide

meanings.definition: hit something so that it bounces
refuse to accept and send back

examples: The ex-boxer's job is to bounce people who want to enter this private club
